title: hieracium crinitellum
intro: Hieracium crinitellum, also known as Hairy Hawkweed or Hawkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Hieracium crinitellum include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Hieracium crinitellum can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
